evidence: CMD49 single-block write used PIO: wait_dma=0 pio=1 and copied 512/512.
EXT4 root mounted read-only and /bin/sh started.
The later rw boundary was not covered because H087 allowed CMD25 writes only up to 16 blocks.
conclusion: H087 proves small PIO writes and read-only userspace, but not the real 24-block CMD25 rw boundary.
